page_metadata.biotools__summary: A program for manipulating Affymetrix SNP metadata. SNPsetter will filter the SNPs exported, by chromosome, by allele frequency, or by distance from the last-exported SNP.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A program for manipulating Affymetrix SNP metadata. SNPsetter will filter the SNPs exported, by chromosome, by allele frequency, or by distance from the last-exported SNP.
